title: Dulov Cat Catnip Toys, 6-Pack Catnip Fish Toys for Cats, Interactive Plush Chew Toys for Kittens, Teeth Cleaning & Play​
features: ​Premium Catnip Infusion: Each toy is filled with high-quality, organic catnip to stimulate your cat's natural instincts and encourage active play.​
​Interactive Design for Engagement: The fish-shaped design and soft plush material make these toys perfect for batting, chewing, and carrying, keeping your cat entertained for hours.​
Durable and Safe Materials: Crafted from non-toxic, bite-resistant plush fabric, ensuring safety during playtime and longevity of the toys.​
Supports Dental Health: Chewing on these toys can help clean your cat's teeth and massage gums, promoting better oral hygiene.​
Ideal for Kittens and Adult Cats: Suitable for cats of all ages, these toys provide mental stimulation and physical exercise, reducing boredom and destructive behavior.​
description: Product description Delight your feline friend with this 6-pack of Catnip Fish Toys, designed to provide endless entertainment and promote healthy habits. Each toy features a soft, plush exterior and is infused with premium organic catnip to entice play. The fish-shaped design appeals to your cat's hunting instincts, encouraging batting, kicking, and chewing. Made from durable, non-toxic materials, these toys are safe for both kittens and adult cats. Regular play can aid in dental health by reducing plaque and massaging gums. Perfect for indoor cats, these toys help alleviate boredom and prevent destructive behavior, ensuring your pet stays happy and active. Directions No restrictions
